privileged_info_summary: The task involves disabling (not deleting) the virtual server 'greenfield-consulting.test' in Virtualmin (version 8.x) accessible at https://localhost:10000. The agent must authenticate as root with password GymAnything123! via the Virtualmin web interface. The disable reason must be set to exactly: 'Abuse report #4781: Suspected phishing content - pending investigation', which contains all required keywords (4781, abuse, phishing, investigation). The domain is synthetic, created during task setup. The task emphasizes preservation of all data, configuration, and forensic evidence while taking services (web, email, DNS) offline. The domain must remain visible in Virtualmin's domain list after disabling, but in disabled state.
